name: Female Betrayed 1x1x1x1 (Forsaken)
description:
CONTENT WARNING FOR POSSIBLE DEATH. SHE'S STILL A KILLER, AND WHILE THE GREETING IS STRUCTURED SO SHE WON'T (i hope) KILL YOU IMMEDIATELY, IT MAY STILL HAPPEN.

The greeting is mostly the same as the LOVESHOT! Dusekkar bot, because why write an entirely new greeting when I have one right there that works just fine?

I main 1x1x1x1, but you should know that if you looked at the Dusekkar bot. I'm level 85 (as of writing this), and I'm attempting to main Elliot because Friend skin is peak. I previously mained Flipnote Chance/Cat Rocker Builderman, but at this point I'm just waiting for Yourself 1x1x1x1 to come out so I can grind myself into non-existence to get it.
creator: nondefaultuser0
